query: What happens if I go to an out of network dentist?
answer:
Benefits are not provided for out-of-network dental services.

| Topic | Coverage Information |
| :--- | :--- |
| Exclusions And Limitations | The plan does not provide benefits for any of the following conditions, treatments, services, or for any direct complications or consequences thereof.
